channel.title: Challenges on Zymacs
channel.description: Recent content in Challenges on Zymacs

item.title: Five Days No Ai
item.description: Five Days No AI I cannot say I am the heaviest user of AI since I lack the stats to back that up. But I am sure anyone can tell if they are using AI too much. And that sentiment for me always arises out of concern for the downsides its having on my productivity. The effect its having on my ability to sit through a hard task. So I was like, how about a simple game this week.
